appliedUpdates.description: Documented that synthetic pave endpoints must allocate generated vertex IDs via `BopDs::next_generated_vertex_id()` rather than fixed sentinel IDs.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Update `rust-bop-worker` guidance for targeted Rust tests to warn that `cargo test -p truck-bop <name> -- --exact` can match 0 tests for module-scoped unit tests; require checking matched-test counts and using module-qualified paths or broader filters when needed.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: `/Volumes/DPC/work/cad/truck-new/.factory/skills/rust-bop-worker/SKILL.md` Step 2 recommends `cargo test -p truck-bop <test_name> -- --exact`; the fix handoff/transcript for worker `2343890c-5bb0-4ef0-8b3c-8060ca52a241` records `pave_sorting_allocates_generated_vertex_ids_for_missing_endpoints -- --exact` and `pave_sorting_reuses_existing_generated_endpoint_ids_on_rebuild -- --exact` both running 0 tests.
